name: gvi-minimarket
description: Gestor de Ventas Intuitivo - Version Modular
author: GVI

scripts.pack: set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& set ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache\electron&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache\electron-builder&& electron-builder --win nsis
